commentaries.author: Bede
commentaries.content: He says, When the Holy Spirit comes upon you, it certainly will not be to bring the kingdom of Israel, or the kingdom of God to Israel, as you think, but rather it will be to furnish you the power to bear witness concerning me.

commentaries.author: Erasmus of Rotterdam
commentaries.content: Until now, the Law has held sway among the Jews. It is the Father's will that the reign of the Gospel extend as widely as the world extends.

commentaries.author: Eusebius of Caesarea
commentaries.content: you shall be witnesses for me: that is, of His death and resurrection.

commentaries.author: Thomas Aquinas
commentaries.content: you shall be witnesses for me: He adds why this testimony is appropriate when he says in John's Gospel (15:27), because you have been with me from the beginning, that is, the beginning of my preaching and working of miracles, and so you can testify to what you have seen and heard.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
